apply_rule: pred = w*rbfe_cal + (1-w)*dock_cal where RBFE present, else dock_cal. dock_cal=dock_slope*CNNaffinity+dock_intercept; rbfe_cal=rbfe_slope*pred_pEC50_raw+rbfe_intercept.
note: Blend weight deliberately set above the RAE optimum to give RBFE a meaningful voice for methods evaluation. RBFE is expected to underperform docking on this target; see writeup.
